creator: hcoyote@ghostar.ath.cx
text:
It appears that devel/p5-Danga-Socket has a dependency on Sys::Syscall, but
there is no port for Sys::Syscall.  This makes the port unuseable.

Fix: 

p5-Sys-Syscall will need to be created and a dependency added.  I'm willing
to give it a go, but want to see if Jacques has something already built that
never got submitted.  Worse comes to worst, I'll just BSDPAN it for now until
something useable comes up.
How-To-Repeat: 
$ cd /usr/ports/devel/p5-Danga-Socket
$ make install
$ perl -MDanga::Socket -e 1
Can't locate Sys/Syscall.pm in @INC (@INC contains: /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8/BSDPAN /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8 .) at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Danga/Socket.pm line 117.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Danga/Socket.pm line 117.
Compilation failed in require.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted.
